meta.note_bands_covered_external: bands_covered_external is null for all pairs. The v4 matrix prose does not express external band coverage per LT in a parseable form; null is reported per the Phase 2a gap-handling rule rather than invented.

pairs.rationale: RSHE names managing emotions propositionally at EoP and EoS; REAL sequences regulation as practised skill A–F with mechanism-level explanation by D
CfW WM2 PS1–PS5 covers self-regulation in strongly parallel progression
CASEL Self-Management A–F closely parallels LT 1.1
CS Dimension 3 Emotional Skills Y2–Y12 closely parallels; CS has equal behavioural specificity
RSHE names empathy/respect at EoP and EoS but at lower grain; Band C empathy specifically absent in RSHE
CfW WM2/WM4 empathy progression PS1–PS5 parallels LT 1.2 A–E; Band F systemic-empathy absent in CfW
CASEL Social Awareness A–F closely parallels LT 1.2
CS Dimension 6 Situational Skills Y2–Y12 closely parallels
RSHE has no identity content
CfW WM4 PS4–PS5 addresses identity-shaped-by-groups at Bands D–E only; Bands A–C and F absent
CASEL Self-Awareness A–F covers identity but affirmative rather than interrogative; LT 1.3 orientation is culturally-situated self-awareness rather than strengths identification
CS Dimension 1 Y2–Y12 covers identity affirmatively; CS Dimension 4 Y2–Y12 covers shared humanity; together they approximate LT 1.3 but neither carries LT 1.3's cultural-lens orientation
RSHE has no attention content
CfW WM2 PS3–PS4 touches attention awareness; no systematic progression to Band F
CASEL persistence and task-focus content appears at B and E but no Band F attention-audit content
CS Y9 sustained-practice content touches; no systematic progression
RSHE decision-making content at EoS only — Bands D–E; Bands A–C absent
CfW WM3 PS1–PS5 closely parallels LT 2.2 A–E
CASEL Responsible Decision-Making A–F closely parallels
CS Dimensions 7 and 9 touch decision-making Y2–Y12; less systematic than LT 2.2
RSHE health habits content at EoS only — Bands D–E; Bands A–C absent
CfW WM1 PS1–PS5 covers diet and physical health; LT 3.1 Band E–F structural-factors and systems content absent in CfW
CASEL has no physical health habits content
CS has no physical health habits content
RSHE emotional resilience and help-seeking at EoP and EoS closely parallels LT 3.2 A–E; Band F absent in RSHE
CfW WM1 help-seeking and WM2 wellbeing-sustaining closely parallels LT 3.2 A–F
CASEL Self-Management A–F covers coping and help-seeking but not framework-construction at Band F
CS Y6–Y12 covers resilience strategies; Band F articulated-framework absent in CS
RSHE consent, boundaries, power-dynamics content closely parallels LT 4.1 A–E; Band F absent in RSHE
CfW WM5 covers healthy-relationship safety at PS2–PS5; explicit consent framing less developed than RSHE or LT 4.1
CASEL Relationship Skills A–D addresses assertive communication but consent as explicit construct less developed
CS Dimension 9 covers assertiveness Y2–Y12; consent as explicit construct less developed
RSHE puberty, contraception, STI, sexual-health-services content closely parallels LT 4.2 B–E
CfW has no puberty or sexual-health content
CASEL has no puberty or sexual-health content
CS has no puberty or sexual-health content
RSHE bullying, prejudice, discrimination content at EoP and EoS closely parallels LT 4.3 A–E; RSHE adds legal framing at D and E that LT 4.3 does not adopt
CfW has no bullying or anti-discrimination content
CASEL stereotyping, harmful-social-dynamics, cultural-injustice content at D–F; bystander-response as systematic skill absent in CASEL
CS Dimension 4 shared-humanity, Dimension 11 social-justice content Y6–Y12; bystander reasoning less systematic
RSHE mind-body and mental-health content at EoS addresses adjacent territory but relational-development framing is absent
CfW WM2 and WM5 touch adjacent territory; biological/psychological explanation of attraction/rejection/loss absent in CfW
CASEL has no content on emotional-developmental science applied to relationships
CS Dimension 2 Y9 covers amygdala-function; the systematic propositional framing of LT 4.4 Bands D–F absent in CS
RSHE manage-emotions content at EoS covers adjacent territory; dispositional/observational framing absent in RSHE
CfW WM2 PS3–PS5 covers self-regulation as skill; dispositional-across-contexts observational framing absent in CfW
CASEL Self-Management behavioural indicators A–F function similarly to LT 4.5 observation indicators
CS Dimension 3 Y2–Y12 observable indicators closely parallel LT 4.5 observation indicators, including behavioural specificity and multi-strategy practice at Y12
RSHE communicating-respectfully and conflict-management at EoP and EoS closely parallels LT 5.1 A–E
CfW WM5 communication and WM2 emotional-communication closely parallels LT 5.1 A–E
CASEL Relationship Skills A–F closely parallels
CS Dimension 5 Interpersonal Skills Y2–Y12 closely parallels

CS Dimension 11 social-justice and Dimension 12 spirituality-meaning content covers purpose; community-project practice less emphasised
RSHE mind-body-connection at EoS only — Band D–E; no Band A–C systematic science
CfW WM1 physical-emotional-connections at PS1–PS5; no systematic neuroscience A–F
CASEL has no neuroscience content
CS Dimension 2 Y9 covers amygdala briefly; no systematic progression A–F
